William R. Hopkins, Esq., Law Offices, 415-435-5507, for petitioner and opposing party

MATTER WAS ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
RESPONDENT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY 0F CALIFORNIA Notice And Motion For Sanctions Against Petitioner And His Attorney William R. Hopkins is GRANTED; THE 21 DAY SAFE HARBOR PROVISION WAS SATISFIED AND PLAINTIFF DID NOT WITHDRAWN HIS FRIVOLOUS LAWSUIT, WHICH WAS PLAINLY BARRED BY RES JUDICATA AND THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. PLAINTIFF AND HIS COUNSEL SHALL PAY DEFENDANTS $2,857.50 AS A SANCTION. Prevailing party to submit a form of order according to rules. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189. (301/PJB)
